title: Help with GraphQL timeline query
excerpt: I want to use make.com to pull timeline data from all items within a group of a specific monday board, and tell me earliest and latest dates detailed from all items within that group, hence effectively providing me with …

posts.author: James_Eadie (James Eadie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to use make.com to pull timeline data from all items within a group of a specific monday board, and tell me earliest and latest dates detailed from all items within that group, hence effectively providing me with the timelines for that group. I have my make.com scenarios ready up to the Execute GraphQL Query module, and I just cant seem to find a way to make it work.

Any help?
